steps.title: Identify the core element to illustrate
steps.content: The claim focuses on people's emotional attachment to where they live. I need the quotation that directly shows this emotional bond to home.

steps.title: Match that element to the best quotation
steps.content:
Choice B directly illustrates the emotional attachment through “power over the mind, and the affections,” which universally applies “to the lowly as well as the great.” The other three address truthfulness (A), sleep quality (C), and reputation (D)—none about emotional attachment to home.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
